zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Odingsells II於大約1246年出生在英國賀福爾時，他的父親William de Odingsells31歲，母親Joan De Washbourne33歲。他於大約1264年與Ela FitzWalter結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1294年被列為justicator of ireland。他去世於1295年4月19日在英國瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可 卡素享年50歲，埋葬在英國瓦維其可爾萊薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Odingsells II于大约1246年出生在英国賀福爾时，他的父亲William de Odingsells31岁，母亲Joan De Washbourne33岁。他于大约1264年与Ela FitzWalter结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1294年被列为justicator of ireland。他去世于1295年4月19日在英国瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可 卡素享年50岁，埋葬在英国瓦維其可爾萊薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Odingsells II was born about 1246, in Herefordshire, England, his father, William de Odingsells, was 31 and his mother, Joan De Washbourne, was 33. He married Ela FitzWalter about 1264. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1294, at the age of 49, his occupation is listed as justicator of ireland. He died on 19 April 1295, in Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Wroxall, Warwickshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Odingsells II est né environ 1246, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Odingsells, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan De Washbourne, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Ela FitzWalter environ 1264. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1294, à l’âge de 49 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justicator of ireland. Il est décédé le 19 avril 1295, à Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Wroxall, Warwickshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Odingsells II um 1246 in Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Odingsells 31 und seine Mutter Joan De Washbourne 33. Er hat um 1264 Ela FitzWalter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1294, als er 49 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justicator of ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 19. April 1295 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Wroxall, Warwickshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Odingsells II è nato il circa 1246 nel Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, William de Odingsells, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan De Washbourne, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Ela FitzWalter circa 1264. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1294, all'età di 49 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justicator of ireland. Morì il 19 aprile 1295, nel Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Wroxall, Warwickshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Odingsells IIが約1246年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William de Odingsellsは31歳，母Joan De Washbourneは33歳であった。約1264年にEla FitzWalterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1294年，49歳の時，職業はjusticator of irelandと記録されている。彼は1295年4月19日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストク カストルで50歳で死去し，イギリスワーウィクシュアイアウロクサルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Odingsells II(이)가 대략 1246년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Odingsells(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan De Washbourne(은)는 33세였다. 그는 대략 1264년 Ela FitzWalter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1294년, 49세의 나이로 그의 직업은 justicator of ireland이었다. 그는 1295년 4월 19일 영국 워윅실르 맥스스토크 카스틀에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워윅실르 록스알에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Odingsells II nasceu aproximadamente 1246, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Odingsells, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan De Washbourne, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela FitzWalter aproximadamente 1264. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1294, com 49 anos, sua profissão aparece como justicator of ireland. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 1295, em Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Wroxall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Odingsells II родился около 1246 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Odingsells было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan De Washbourne, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela FitzWalter около 1264 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1294 году, в возрасте 49 лет,  он работал по профессии justicator of ireland. Он умер 19 апреля 1295 г. в местности макссток кастл, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности роксалл, варвиккшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Odingsells II nació aproximadamente 1246, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Odingsells, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan De Washbourne, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Ela FitzWalter aproximadamente 1264. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1294, a la edad de 49 años, su ocupación registrada era justicator of ireland. Murió el 19 de abril de 1295, en Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Wroxall, Warwickshire, Inglaterra.
